long_description:
After the deployment of DPU version 1.6.202510292014-1.213.0, fabcon-manager pods are not able to connect fabcon for the following smart nics

che3-qz1-sr3-rk174-s40-sn1
che3-qz1-sr3-rk174-s18-sn2
che3-qz1-sr3-rk175-s28-sn1
che3-qz1-sr3-rk175-s14-sn2
che3-qz1-sr3-rk175-s10-sn1
che3-qz1-sr3-rk173-s40-sn2
che3-qz1-sr3-rk171-s40-sn1
che3-qz1-sr3-rk175-s02-sn2
che3-qz1-sr3-rk173-s36-sn2
Incident source: https://ibm.pagerduty.com/incidents/Q2OPR8A43PD5WD - Mamta Prabhu
short_description: fabcon-manager unable to connect to fabcon-server in CHE zone3
close_notes:
(All Timestamps must be in UTC)
Issue Summary: fabcon-manager unable to connect to fabcon-server in CHE zone3
SME Findings: 
Reason of Escalation: 
Resolution Steps: I ran the commands as below:
Remediation Steps - from the hostdpu
When the issue is with sn1
p0v1
ifconfig p0v1
sudo ip link set dev p0v1 address fe:ff:0b:00:01:e7
ifconfig p0v1
p0v0
ifconfig p0v0
sudo ip link set dev p0v0 address fe:ff:0b:ff:00:02
ifconfig p0v0
When the issue is with sn2
p2v1
ifconfig p2v1
sudo ip link set dev p2v1 address fe:ff:0b:00:02:e7 
ifconfig p2v1
p2v0
ifconfig p2v0
sudo ip link set dev p2v0 address fe:ff:0b:ff:00:02
ifconfig p2v0
Verification - on the smartnic
ss --tcp | grep 50057 
Signature of Issue: fabcon-manager unable to connect to fabcon-server in CHE zone3
Jira/Github/Other Tickets: 
Category/Subcategory: other
Timeline Summary: Executed the remadiation steps as requested
Resolution Runbook: Not Needed
Caused by Change/Incident: 
Warroom:

Outage End:
